description: Send desktop notifications when Claude finishes or needs attention

hooks.command: bash '~/.codex-linux/plugins/cache/notify-on-done/notify-on-done/1.0.0/scripts/notify.sh question "Claude Code 需要你的确认"'
bash '~/.codex-linux/plugins/cache/notify-on-done/notify-on-done/1.0.0/scripts/notify.sh plan_ready "Claude Code 计划已生成，等待审批"'
